title: VCls Statement
description: VCls clears the image display area of all graphics.
notes:
VCls causes all graphics which were drawn during execution of a vision sequence to be removed from the image display area.
  This is most often used to remove screen clutter between vision sequences.  For example, if your application uses vision in only one part of the application, you may want to clear the image display area while the robot is doing other parts of the application since the vision processing stage of the application is complete.

VCls is available only from the SPEL+ Language.
